LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANTS VINCENT LIU , AN INDIVIDUAL, BISHOP FOX INC., AND STACH & LIU, LLC'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. OFF CALENDAR. THE LAMBERT DECLARATION FAILS TO SHOW THAT THE PARTIES MET AND CONFERRED "IN PERSON, BY TELEPHONE, OR BY VIDEO CONFERENCE" IN COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 430.41. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH THE CODE. THE RESPONSE TO THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY DECEMBER 20, 2024. JUDGE: ROCHELLE C. EAST; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/RCE)

LAW & MOTION/DISCOVERY, DEPT. 301, AS TO MARCH-21-2025 HEARING RE: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE; PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SHOWN ANY GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR HIS FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S DECEMBER 20, 2024 ORDER. ACCORDINGLY, THE COURT SANCTIONS HIM IN THE AMOUNT OF $250 PURSUANT TO CCP 177.5. SANCTIONS SHALL BE PAID WITHIN 10 COURT DAYS OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NO APPEARANCES. (301/CVA)

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 301, AS TO THE FEB-06-2025 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT VINCENT LIU, BISHOP FOX INC., AND STACH & LIU, LLC'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT; THE COURT OVERRULES THE DEMURRER EXCEPT AS TO COUNT 2 FOR DEFAMATION; THE COURT SUSTAINS THE DEMURRER AS TO THIS COUNT WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. DE LEMOS HAS NOT PROVIDED THE COURT WITH COURTESY COPIES AND THE COURT THEREFORE ORDERS HIM TO SHOW CAUSE WHY HE SHOULD NOT BE SANCTIONED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250 FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S DECEMBER 20, 2024 ORDER. THE OSC IS SET FOR HEARING ON MARCH 21, 2025 AT 9:00 A.M. IN DEPT. 301 (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING). COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-05-2025 Continued To Jun-04-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-21-2025 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

On December 20, 2024, defendant's demurrer was on for hearing. The court continued the matter to January 17, 2025, for hearing and, in its minute order, ordered plaintiff to provide courtesy copies of its filing immediately with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Courtesy copies are required pursuant to Local Rule 2.7(B). On January 17, 2025, the matter was continued to February 6, 2025. On February 6, 2025, the court heard the demurrer, but, as noted in the court's minute order of that date, Plaintiff again failed to provide courtesy copies as required by Local Rule 2.7(B). The court issued an order to show cause which stated that "De Lemos has not provided the court with courtesy copies and the court therefore orders him to show cause why he should not be sanctioned in the amount of $250 for failure to comply with the court's December 20, 2024 order." The court set the OSC for hearing on March 21, 2025. Plaintiff has not shown any good cause or substantial justification for his failure to comply with the court's December 20, 2024 order. Accordingly, the court sanctions him in the amount of $250 pursuant to CCP 177.5. Sanctions shall be paid within 10 court days of entry of this order.

Order signed.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; No appearances. (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-23-2025 Continued To Apr-02-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-06-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT VINCENT LIU, BISHOP FOX INC., AND STACH & LIU, LLC's DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendants Bishop Fox Inc. (collectively Bishop Fox) et al demur to Plaintiff Brian de Lemos's First Amended Complaint (FAC). The court overrules the demurrer except as to Count 2 for defamation; the court sustains the demurrer as to this count with leave to amend.

This court previously took the demurrer off calendar on December 20, 2024 because the opposing party de Lemos did not provide courtesy copies of his papers in compliance with San Francisco Local Rule 2.7B. The court ordered de Lemos to comply. De Lemos has not provided the court with courtesy copies and the court therefore orders him to show cause why he should not be sanctioned in the amount of $250 for failure to comply with the court's December 20, 2024 order. The OSC is set for hearing on March 21, 2025 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 301 (see word minutes for complete ruling).

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling with a cover letter reflecting compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
